news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.
GraniteShares Expands YieldBOOST(TM) Platform with Four New Sector and Fixed Income ETFs

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST Financials ETF (FINY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is an actively managed fund seeking to provide weekly income. The fund strategy involves writing put options on a 3x daily leveraged ETF tied to the S&P Financial Select Sector Index. FINY was launched on May 5, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.
